# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.

Report privately through GitHub's
[**"Report a vulnerability"**](https://github.com/nexus-xyz/nexus-exchange-ts/security/advisories/new)
flow (the **Security** tab → **Report a vulnerability**). This opens a private
advisory visible only to the maintainers.

We aim to acknowledge a report within 3 business days and to keep you updated as
we investigate and ship a fix. Once a fix is released we will publish an advisory
crediting the reporter, unless you prefer to remain anonymous.

## Scope

This repository is the TypeScript SDK — a client library for the public Nexus
Exchange API. Reports about the SDK itself (for example: leaking credentials,
unsafe request signing, dependency vulnerabilities) belong here.

Issues in the exchange backend or the API spec itself are out of scope for this
repo; report those to the relevant Nexus repository or through
[security@nexus.xyz](mailto:security@nexus.xyz).
